verses.text: Topa in Moses kiangah
“Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Kei pen Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi

Note na ten'na uh Egypt gamah amaute a gamtat bangin note na gamta kei ding uh a, note kong paipihna Kanaan gamah zong amaute a gamtat bangin note na gamta kei ding uh hi. Note in amau' gamtatnate na zui kei ding uh hi
Note in keima biakna ngeina kipte semin ka thukhamte lenin tuate na zui ding uh hi. Kei pen Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi
Tua ahih ciangin note in ka thukhamte leh ka biakna ngeina kipte na zui ding uh hi. Tuate a zui mi peuhpeuh nungta ding hi. Kei pen Topa ka hi hi
“Note kuamah in na kinaipih na behte uh mawhpih dingin na naih kei ding uh hi. Kei pen Topa ka hi hi
Na nu mawhpihna tawh na pa' tungah maizumna na tun' kei ding hi. Amah pen na nu ahih manin na mawhpih kei ding hi
Nangmah in na pa' zi dangte zong na mawhpih kei ding hi. Tua pen na pa' mindaina ding ahi hi
Nangmah in na sanggamnu, na pa' tanu, ahih kei leh na nu' tanu, inn-a suak hita leh gam-a suak hita leh na mawhpih kei ding hi
Nangmah in na tapa' tanu ahih kei leh na tanu' tanu na mawhpih kei ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amau' mindaina pen nangma mindaina mah ahi hi
Na pa' zi' tanu, na pa' tanu pen na sanggamnu ahih manin na mawhpih kei ding hi
Na ni na mawhpih kei ding hi; tuanu pen na pa' sanggam numei ahi hi
Na nu' sanggamnu na mawhpih kei ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amah pen na nu tawh a kinai beh numei ahi hi
Na pa' sanggampa' tungah mindaina na tun' kei ding hi; tua pen ama zi na naih kei ding hi, cihnopna ahi hi; tuanu pen nangma innlak nu ahi hi
Na monu na mawhpih kei ding hi; tuanu pen na tapa' zi ahi hi; amah na mawhpih kei ding hi
Na sanggampa' zi na mawhpih kei ding hi; tua pen na sanggampa' mindaina ding ahi hi

Na luppih numei khat' tanu na mawhpih kei ding a, tua numei' tapa' tanu hita leh tua numei' tanu' tanu hita leh, luppih dingin na la kei ding hi. Amaute pen nangmah tawh a kinai beh numeite ahi uh hi. Tua bang gamtatna pen a siahuai ahi hi
Nangmah in a sanggamnu a hingsuan dingin numei khat zi-in na la kei ding a, a sanggamnu a hing laipi-in amah na luppih kei ding hi
“Nangmah in numei khat nin a neih laitak, a nit hun sungin luppih dingin na naih kei ding hi
Na vengpa' zi tawh na lumkhawm kei ding a, tuanu tawh na kininsak kei ding hi
Nangmah in Molek tungah meihal biakna-a piak dingin na tate khat peuhpeuh na pia kei ding a, tua bangin na Pasian' min na daisak kei ding hi; keimah pen Topa ka hi hi
Numei khat tawh lupkhop bangin pasal khat tawh na lumkhawm kei ding hi; tua pen a kihhuai ahi hi
Ganhing khatpeuh tawh mawhin tua tawh na kininsak kei ding a, numei khatpeuh in zong ganhing khatpeuh tawh a mawh dingin kipialo ding hi; tua pen ngeina hilo hi
“Hih nate khatpeuh tawh note kininsak kei un; bang hang hiam cih leh note' mai-a ka paihkhiat minamte in hihte khempeuh tawh amaute kininsak uh hi
Leitung a nin suak ahih manin keimah in a leitang gimna pia-in, leitang in ama tunga a teng mite a luakhia hi
Ahih hangin, tualsung mi hita leh note lakah hong peem khualmi hita leh, note in keima thukhamte leh keima biakna ngeina kipte na zui ding uh a, hih a kihhuai nate khat beek na hih kei ding uh hi
(bang hang hiam cih leh note' ma-a a om gam mite in hih a kihhuaite khempeuh gamta uh ahih manin leitang a nin a suak hi
tua bang hi kei leh leitang in note' ma-a a om minamte a luakkhiat bangin note in amah na nitsak uh ciangin amah in note hong luakhia ding hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh hih a kihhuaite khatpeuh a hihte peuhmah, amau' mite lak panin kihawlkhia ding hi

“Tua ahih ciangin note' ma-a a kizang hih a kihhuai ngeinate khat peuhpeuh na gamtat ngeilohna ding uh leh tuate tawh nomau na kinitsak lohna dingun kong thuhilhte zui un; kei pen Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi,” a ci hi.
